info.name: SaaS API
info.description:
Complete NestJS multi-tenant SaaS ERP API.

**Setup:**
1. Import `api.environment.json` as environment
2. Select **API - Local** as active environment
3. Run **Register** or **Login** — tokens are saved automatically
4. All protected endpoints use `{{access_token}}` via collection-level Bearer auth

**Modules:** Identity · Organization · CRM · Catalog · Workspaces · Finance · Deals · Sales · Procurement · Inventory

item.name: Auth

request.description: Creates a new tenant (company) with OWNER user. Public.
Authenticates user and returns JWT token pair. Public.
Validates refresh token and issues a new token pair. Uses {{refresh_token}}.
Returns authenticated user data from JWT.

item.description: Authentication endpoints — Register, Login, Refresh, Me

request.description: Sends an invitation email with a sign-up link.
Resends an existing pending invitation.
Creates account from invitation token. Public.

formdata.description: PNG, JPG or WebP — max 2 MB

request.description: Upload company logo. multipart/form-data with field "file".

query.description: Search by name or serial number

request.description: Assign asset to a project or employee.

request.description: Returns PDF binary. Set Accept: application/pdf.
Transitions DRAFT → SENT.
Transitions SENT → ACCEPTED. Creates a Deal automatically.
Transitions SENT → REJECTED.
Marks quotation as EXPIRED.
Actions: activate | hold | complete | cancel

body.raw:
{
  "type": "INCOME",
  "amount": 50000,
  "description": "Payment from Acme Tech — Web Portal project",
  "reference": "INV-2025-001",
  "date": "2025-03-01"
}

request.description: Transitions PENDING → APPROVED. Generates an Invoice automatically.
Cancels a PENDING deal.
Transitions DRAFT → SENT.
Transitions SENT → PAID.
Cancels a DRAFT or SENT invoice.

request.description: Transitions DRAFT → PENDING_REVIEW.
Transitions PENDING_REVIEW → APPROVED. Creates a Purchase Order automatically.
Transitions PENDING_REVIEW → REJECTED.
Marks the order as RECEIVED.
